event_description: User accessed external content via browser, resulting in a redirect to a bit.ly URL.
Presence of staged archive 2011-W2.zip identified in logs, potentially staging malicious content.
Evidence indicates download of malicious payload from C2 server.
Presence of suspicious executable pkxezy1tji98.exe in user temp directory.
Evidence indicates secondary payload download from C2 server.
Evidence indicates execution of masqueraded svchost.exe from non-standard directory.
Presence of registry file winclient.reg in system32 directory, potentially related to persistence.
Evidence indicates established C2 communication with remote server.
